description: Data files required by the FRS plan. Per-class entries are expanded across `classes` from plan_config.json (regular, special, eco, eso, judges, senior_management, admin). Path templates use {class_name}; entries may declare a `fallback` path that, if present, satisfies the requirement.

files.purpose: Salary distribution by entry_age x yos x age_group, per membership class
Active member headcount by entry_age x yos x age_group, per class
Per-class salary growth schedule; falls back to plan-wide salary_growth.csv
Current retiree distribution by entry age, used for current-retiree liability
Optional new-entrant profile (entry age x start salary)
Per-class withdrawal rates by yos x age group
Per-class retirement rates by age x rate set
Base mortality rates by age x gender x table
Mortality improvement scale (year x age x gender)
Initial funding state: payroll ratios, NC rates, AVA/MVA, AAL by class
Initial amortization layers (period x balance, by class)
Synthetic cashflow stream sizing the current term-vested AAL
